name: Chocolate Mud Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a double boiler, stir in combined instant coffee and hot water, then mix in cocoa powder and castor sugar until smooth.
2. Sift the self-raising flour into three separate bowls.
3. Gradually add the melted ingredients to an electric mixer bowl, incorporating the sifted dry ingredients one at a time.
4. Add eggs and vanilla extract, then beat the mixture well.
5. Grease and lightly line a 25 cm cake tin with parchment paper. Pour in the batter.
6. Bake in a slow oven (150°C) for approximately 2.5 hours.
7. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before turning out onto a wire rack.
Icing:
8. Melt dark cooking chocolate and unsalted butter in a double boiler, then beat with a wooden spoon until smooth.
9. Pour the icing over the cooled cake and spread evenly.
